splits.label: Nanoparticle Synthesis
splits.description: Papers focusing on the methods and techniques used to create nanoparticles, including 'green' synthesis and specific material preparations.

splits.label: Nanoparticle Applications
splits.description: Papers detailing the uses of nanoparticles in various fields, particularly biomedicine, drug delivery, and antimicrobial applications.

splits.label: Nanoparticle Properties
splits.description: Papers investigating the fundamental physical, chemical, and optical characteristics of nanoparticles, such as size, shape, and surface effects.

reasoning: The parent topic 'silver nanoparticle' is too broad, encompassing distinct research areas like synthesis methods, diverse applications (especially biomedical and antimicrobial), and fundamental properties. Splitting into 'Nanoparticle Synthesis', 'Nanoparticle Applications', and 'Nanoparticle Properties' will create more focused and manageable sub-topics.
